title: rytigynia glabrifolia
intro: Rytigynia glabrifolia, also known as African stammer tree or African stammer, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is widely used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rytigynia glabrifolia are numerous, and it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In terms of herbal preparations, Rytigynia glabrifolia is often made into a decoction by boiling the bark and leaves in water to create a medicinal tea or infusion.
